scope_note: Gradient Lipschitz Gain Cert family [101]: derives curvature gain = min(||grad_vector||_2, 2.0) from the gradient vector. This is the natural local Lipschitz constant of the update step. Together with [98] (GNN weight spectral norm) and [99] (attention score spectral norm), establishes derived gain across three architecture classes: gradient descent, graph/message-passing, and sequence/attention.
